item.title: China poised to trim growth ambitions, pursue timid rebalancing efforts
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
China's National People's Congress begins on March 5 with Beijing expected to set 2026 growth at 4.5–5%.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), parliament(+2), court(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: The US$500m question: How prediction markets ‘called’ the Iran bombing before it happened
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
SINGAPORE, March 2 — Betting payouts following US attacks on Iran have thrown new scrutiny on prediction markets,...
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), election(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Crude nears US$80 and gas prices soar as markets tumble on Iran conflict fears
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)

item.title: Wall St futures fall as Middle East conflict stokes inflation worries
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
With the Strait of Hormuz closed to marine traffic, a surge in oil prices could quickly seep into the broader economy.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Middle East war puts shipping firms in tight insurance spot
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Shipping operators face rising operational risk after insurers canceled Gulf coverage following attacks on vessels in the Strait of Hormuz.
Matched: war(+3), ceasefire(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2), outbreak(+3)

item.title: Asia scrambles for LNG as Qatar halts output due to Iran war
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
US, Israeli strikes on Iran have choked tanker traffic, halted Qatari LNG output, of which more than 80% is exported to Asia.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Stocks slide as Middle East conflict fans inflation fears
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Shares resume selloff while the dollar strengthens as investors assess conflict risks on energy prices and the global economy.
Matched: policy(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: Global brands shut Middle East stores as conflict causes chaos
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investors fear the conflict could undermine the region's tourism and luxury spending, a key growth driver for major brands.

item.title: Wall Street ends narrowly mixed, trading volatile after air strikes on Iran
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Bargain-hunting US investors bought on dips after the early selloff, expecting conflict-driven market disruptions to remain limited.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), inflation(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Indian basmati held up at ports, in transit as Iran war halts new deals
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Freight rates have more than doubled since the US and Israel attacked Iran, says trade officials.

item.title: Airline shares slide further on travel chaos and fuel uncertainty
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Asian airline shares fell for a second day as escalating conflict between the US, Israel and Iran disrupted travel, pushed up oil prices and forced the closure of key Middle Eastern hubs.

Source: FMT Business (Finance)

item.title: Supreme Court bars redrawing only Republican-held NYC congressional district for 2026 election
item.description:
Source: CNBC Markets (Finance)
The Supreme Court ruling is a potentially significant one for Republicans, who are trying to retain their majorities in both chambers of Congress.
Matched: court(+2), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Jamie Dimon says Trump’s $5 billion debanking lawsuit ‘has no merit’ but he’s sympathetic to concerns
item.description:
Source: CNBC Markets (Finance)
The suit against JPMorgan, the world's biggest bank by market cap, and its CEO puts Dimon in an awkward position.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)
